device_name: Study Watch with Irregular Pulse Monitor (Home), Study Watch with Irregular Pulse Monitor
intended_use: The Study Watch with Irregular Pulse Monitor is indicated for use by adult patients (22 years and older) who have been diagnosed with, or are susceptible to developing, atrial fibrillation enabling th
intended_use_full: The Study Watch with Irregular Pulse Monitor is indicated for use by adult patients (22 years and older) who have been diagnosed with, or are susceptible to developing, atrial fibrillation enabling them to monitor and record their heart rhythms. Study Watch is also intended to record, store, transfer, and display single-channel electrocardiogram (ECG) rhythms.
ground_truth: iRhythm Technologies Zio XT Patch ECG data worn simultaneously with Study Watch
other_metrics: Per-interval sensitivity 96.1% (95% CI: 92.7 - 98.0); Per-interval specificity 98.1% (95% CI: 97.2 - 99.1); In-clinic use sensitivity 98.3%, in-clinic use specificity 100.0%
